meta.trigger_event: Weekly scheduled run — no new evidence, SHS decay check and regime stability audit

scenarios.label: 持久消耗战（无谈判出口）
premises: 哈梅内伊已死，伊朗国内权力真空持续
莫杰塔巴未能在W4-8完成IRGC整合
美国国内聚旗效应尚未耗尽，无政治压力停火
盟军防空弹药在W5前触及物理极限但无替代方案
scenarios.antithesis: 沉没成本检验：若伊朗实际已秘密建立后备指挥链，权力真空假设不成立，冲突可能比预期更快进入谈判轨道。此外，五角大楼$50亿+开支若引发国会审查，聚旗效应可能提前瓦解。
open_questions: 莫杰塔巴是否已获得IRGC地面部队效忠？
美国国会是否会在W6前启动战争授权辩论？
中国/俄罗斯是否会提供防空弹药补给给伊朗？

scenarios.label: 弹药耗尽强制谈判
premises: 盟军拦截弹库存在W3-5降至临界水平
$3.5K无人机 vs $1-3M拦截弹成本非对称不可持续
拦截率跌破85%后伤亡飙升触发政治压力
双方均面临不可承受损失，被迫接受某种停火
scenarios.antithesis: 美国可能通过紧急国防生产法加速拦截弹生产，或以战术核威慑替代常规拦截，完全绕过弹药瓶颈。此外，如果伊朗无人机发射能力也在同窗口耗尽，弹药问题两边对称。
open_questions: 美国战略储备中PAC-3和SM-6的实际库存是否已泄露？
以色列铁穹是否有独立于美国供应链的弹药来源？
伊朗弹道导弹/无人机的实际库存深度是多少？

scenarios.label: 地区全面蔓延（海湾战争化）
premises: 伊朗已对科威特政府设施发动无人机攻击
科威特被迫削减石油产量
伊朗对全海湾国家发动攻击（prob=1.0）
巴格达美国大使馆已遭攻击
scenarios.antithesis: 海湾国家可能选择绥靖而非加入联盟——沙特/UAE过去已展示过在伊朗压力下保持中立的意愿。如果海湾国家集体拒绝提供基地，美军投射能力受限，蔓延反而自限。
open_questions: 沙特是否会开放领空给美军？
土耳其和卡塔尔的中立立场能维持多久？
霍尔木兹海峡是否已实质封锁？

scenarios.label: 战略级升级（核/化学门槛）
premises: 伊朗核设施可能已在空袭清单中
权力真空中IRGC激进派可能推动核突破
美国已实施政权更迭级别打击
常规战手段耗尽后升级阶梯自然指向WMD
scenarios.antithesis: 核升级的观众成本对双方都是灭顶之灾。伊朗即使有核材料也缺乏可靠投送手段。美国使用战术核武将瓦解全球同盟体系。双方均有极强的自我约束动机。
open_questions: 伊朗地下核设施在空袭后的存活状态？
IAEA是否仍在伊朗境内运作？
以色列是否会独立对伊朗核设施使用钻地弹？

bottlenecks.label: 伊朗大规模报复(500导弹/2000无人机)
五角大楼战争开支已超$50亿
科威特被迫削减石油产量

equilibria.label: 持续消耗报复（每周50-100枚无人机/导弹）
一次性倾泻式饱和攻击
转向代理人战争（真主党/胡塞/什叶民兵）
莫杰塔巴成功整合权力
向伊朗提供军事/情报支持
对美经济反制（稀土/美债）

horizon_theses.thesis: 原油价格维持高位震荡区间（$90-105），防空弹药耗尽窗口逼近将推动波动率持续走高。做多原油波动率，对冲通过短期看跌期权。
horizon_theses.tradeable_as: long crude vol (OVX), long front-month WTI calls
horizon_theses.key_assumption: 盟军防空弹药库存在W5前降至临界水平，伊朗无人机攻击节奏不减
horizon_theses.kill_condition: 美国宣布紧急释放SPR超过1亿桶，或伊朗无人机发射率骤降>60%

horizon_theses.thesis: 美国国防股短期仍有上行空间，但边际递减。五角大楼追加拨款预期已部分price-in，关注国会辩论风险。
horizon_theses.tradeable_as: long defense ETF (ITA/XAR) with tight trailing stop
horizon_theses.key_assumption: 国会不会在W5前启动战争授权限制辩论
horizon_theses.kill_condition: 参议院外交关系委员会启动听证，或战争支持率跌破50%

horizon_theses.thesis: 滞胀交易确认窗口：如果油价持续>$85超过6周（约W8-9），美债10Y收益率将突破5.0%同时equity承压。做空美债久期+做多实物商品。
horizon_theses.tradeable_as: short TLT, long DBC/GSG, long TIPS breakevens
horizon_theses.key_assumption: 冲突持续无停火迹象，H3滞胀定价假设确认
horizon_theses.kill_condition: 停火协议达成，或Fed紧急降息信号

horizon_theses.thesis: 海湾国家信用利差扩大。科威特/巴林主权债CDS上行，沙特相对韧性但也承压。
horizon_theses.tradeable_as: long Gulf sovereign CDS, relative value: long Saudi vs short Kuwait
horizon_theses.key_assumption: 伊朗对海湾攻击持续且范围扩大
horizon_theses.kill_condition: 海湾国家与伊朗达成单独停火，或美军成功建立海湾防空伞

horizon_theses.thesis: 后冲突重建与能源供应链重构。如果冲突在W12-16结束，中东能源基础设施重建需求巨大。但如果升级至S4，全球能源安全范式永久改变。
horizon_theses.tradeable_as: long energy infra (conditional), long nuclear energy ETF as hedge
horizon_theses.key_assumption: 冲突终局不超过战略级升级门槛
horizon_theses.kill_condition: 核/化学武器使用，或冲突持续超过W25无终局迹象

positions.sizing_note: 2-3% portfolio risk, skewed to upside calls with put spread hedge
positions.stop_condition: WTI < $82 for 3 consecutive sessions or SPR release > 100M bbl announced

positions.entry_condition: On any 2%+ pullback from current levels
positions.stop_condition: Senate SFRC hearing announced or war approval < 50% in polls

positions.sizing_note: 3% portfolio, scale in over W6-8 as oil confirmation develops
positions.entry_condition: WTI sustained > $85 for 4+ weeks AND 10Y yield > 4.8%
positions.stop_condition: Ceasefire announcement or Fed emergency rate action

positions.sizing_note: 1% notional, pair with short Saudi CDS for relative value
positions.stop_condition: Gulf-Iran bilateral ceasefire or US Gulf air defense umbrella confirmed operational

positions.entry_condition: Conflict duration confirmed > W12 with no resolution path
positions.stop_condition: Rapid ceasefire + Iran energy infra intact > 60%

triggers.signal: 盟军防空弹药库存报告/拦截率数据
triggers.condition: 拦截率报告跌破80%或PAC-3/SM-6库存泄露显示<30天供应
triggers.action: 加速S2权重上调至>0.35，增加crude vol仓位，触发紧急run

triggers.signal: 伊朗国内权力交接信号（IRGC效忠声明/电视讲话）
triggers.condition: 莫杰塔巴或IRGC委员会发表统一指挥声明
triggers.action: H1_commitment_paradox置信度下调，S1权重可能下调，重新评估谈判可能性

triggers.signal: 美国国会战争授权相关动态
triggers.condition: 参议院SFRC宣布听证或War Powers Resolution投票
triggers.action: defense ETF止损退出，S1权重下调，评估政治驱动停火路径
确认H3滞胀假设，执行TLT short建仓，H3置信度上调至>0.75

triggers.signal: 霍尔木兹海峡航运数据
triggers.condition: 日均通过油轮数下降>40%或保险费率上涨>300%
triggers.action: S3权重紧急上调，原油目标价上修至$120+，触发紧急run

triggers.condition: 伊朗浓缩铀丰度>60%或IAEA驱逐
triggers.action: S4权重上调至>0.20，全仓位风险审查，避险资产加仓

trade_level.condition: SPR释放>100M桶或伊朗无人机发射率骤降>60%
参议院外交关系委员会启动战争授权听证
停火协议达成或Fed紧急降息
海湾-伊朗双边停火或美军海湾防空伞确认运作

scenario_level.premise_broken: 莫杰塔巴或IRGC委员会成功整合权力并释放谈判信号
scenario_level.evidence: 伊朗官方媒体统一口径+IRGC指挥链确认

scenario_level.premise_broken: 美国通过DPA加速拦截弹生产且产能在W5前上线
scenario_level.evidence: 五角大楼宣布紧急生产合同+交付时间线

scenario_level.premise_broken: 海湾国家集体选择中立/绥靖而非参战
scenario_level.evidence: GCC联合声明拒绝提供军事基地

regime_level.contradiction: 如果冲突快速冻结（双方弹药同时耗尽+外部大国强制停火），SAD和NCC将骤降，可能触发B→A regime切换

models_loaded.input_summary: No new evidence; prior scenario weights from run_20260309. SHS decay check on H1-H4.
models_loaded.output_summary: No weight updates warranted by evidence. Temporal decay applied: H1 confidence stable (W4-8 window still open), H2/H4 confidence maintained (ammo clock ticking). All weights unchanged.

models_loaded.input_summary: Audit all scenarios with weight>0.10. Focus: S1 (0.42) requires mandatory D-model audit per weight>0.8 rule applied to cumulative S1+S2=0.70.
models_loaded.output_summary: Generated antitheses for all 4 scenarios. Key challenge to S1: sunk cost fallacy check — US may be approaching political cost threshold faster than assumed. Key challenge to S2: ammo depletion may be symmetric (Iran also depleting). S4 antithesis: nuclear escalation audience cost is prohibitive for both sides. No scenario weight change recommended but open questions flagged.

models_loaded.input_summary: 4-order causal chain analysis on critical nodes. Focus on iran_retaliation→ammo_depletion→negotiation pathway and khamenei_killed→power_vacuum→escalation pathway.
models_loaded.output_summary: Order 1: Sustained drone/missile attacks drain interceptor stocks. Order 2: Military requests emergency procurement; Congress debates funding. Order 3: If procurement fails, accept higher casualty rate or negotiate. Order 4: If conflict persists 3-6 months, permanent shift in Gulf security architecture and global energy supply chain restructuring. Cross-domain chain confirmed: military→energy→petrochemical→agriculture→social stability.

models_loaded.input_summary: Identify focal points for iran_retaliation equilibrium selection and khamenei_killed succession outcome. Also analyze china_oppose_regime_change response equilibria.
models_loaded.output_summary: iran_retaliation: sustained attrition is focal (matches Iranian asymmetric doctrine + resource constraints). khamenei_killed: IRGC junta is focal (institutional path of least resistance). china_oppose_regime_change: verbal opposition + UN veto is focal (minimal cost, maximum signaling).

models_loaded.input_summary: Assess commitment credibility for key strategic actors: Iran retaliation commitment, IRGC power consolidation commitment, US regime change commitment.
models_loaded.output_summary: Iran retaliation commitment score 0.82 — high due to audience cost lock-in and no alternative leadership to authorize de-escalation. IRGC junta commitment 0.65 — moderate, internal factions create uncertainty. US regime change: Netanyahu pledge creates high audience cost but Biden/successor may diverge. Exit cost ratio for Iran retaliation = 3.5x (cost of stopping >> cost of continuing).

models_loaded.input_summary: Analyze audience costs constraining nuclear escalation for both US and Iran. Path importance of S4 = 0.12 but consequence severity warrants heavy model.
models_loaded.output_summary: US nuclear use audience cost: catastrophic — NATO alliance dissolution risk, global norm collapse. Iran nuclear breakout audience cost: lower but still severe — triggers immediate Israeli strike and permanent pariah status. Both sides have strong self-restraint incentives. S4 weight justified at 0.12 but should not drop below 0.08 given tail risk. Key variable: IRGC radical faction influence in power vacuum.

divergence_flags.topic: S1 weight stability with no new evidence
divergence_flags.model_a_says: No evidence = no update. S1 weight 0.42 maintained per Bayesian prior.
divergence_flags.model_b_says: Temporal decay should apply — absence of evidence of IRGC consolidation after 4+ weeks is itself weak evidence for continued fragmentation. S1 could merit slight upward revision to 0.44.

shs_writeback.trigger_reason: No new evidence on IRGC consolidation. W4-8 critical window is now active (currently ~W4). Confidence maintained — next run should see movement if consolidation signals emerge or fail to emerge.
Temporal proximity: W3-5 depletion window is now W3-4. No evidence of emergency production ramp-up. Slight upward revision reflects time passage without countermeasure signals.
No new oil price data in evidence. 6-week clock for >$85 confirmation not yet triggered. Maintaining prior.
Convergent with H2 update. Ammo depletion window approaching. No evidence of alternative supply chains (Chinese/Russian to Iran, or emergency US production). Slight upward tick.

graph_proposals.justification: 五角大楼开支超$50亿+首批美军阵亡+平民伤亡叙事三重汇聚，国会辩论成为S1→S2转换的关键中介节点。当前DAG缺少美国国内政治反馈回路。

payload.label: 中国反对立场强化伊朗报复决心
payload.mechanism: 中国外交支持降低伊朗国际孤立感，间接提升持续报复的政治可行性

graph_proposals.justification: 中国明确反对政权更迭的立场为伊朗提供了国际合法性后盾，影响伊朗报复策略的持续性。当前DAG未捕获此传导路径。
